services.title: ASIC Design
services.shortDescription: RTL coding, synthesis, STA, and full custom ASIC tape-out flows.
services.heroDescription: Full-cycle ASIC design services from micro-architecture definition and RTL coding through synthesis, static timing analysis, and tape-out sign-off.

highlights.title: RTL Coding
highlights.description: Synthesisable SystemVerilog/VHDL with coding guidelines and lint-clean delivery.

highlights.title: Logic Synthesis
highlights.description: Synopsys DC / Cadence Genus flows targeting area, power, and timing closure.

highlights.title: Static Timing Analysis
highlights.description: Full-chip STA with multi-corner multi-mode (MCMM) sign-off methodology.

highlights.title: Low-Power Design
highlights.description: Clock gating, power domains, UPF/CPF-based power intent implementation.

highlights.title: CDC / RDC Analysis
highlights.description: Clock-domain crossing and reset-domain crossing analysis and sign-off.

highlights.title: Tape-Out Support
highlights.description: Netlisting, final LVS/DRC coordination, and tape-out package delivery.

services.placeholderDescription: Detailed case studies, process flows, and tool stack information coming soon.

services.title: FPGA Design
services.shortDescription: Rapid prototyping to production-grade FPGA implementations.
services.heroDescription: Rapid FPGA prototyping through production-grade implementations on Xilinx, Intel/Altera, and Lattice platforms — from architecture to bitstream.

highlights.title: Architecture & Partitioning
highlights.description: Resource-aware micro-architecture and logic partitioning for optimal FPGA utilisation.

highlights.title: HDL Implementation
highlights.description: Vendor-agnostic RTL targeting Xilinx Vivado, Intel Quartus, and Lattice Diamond flows.

highlights.title: Timing Closure
highlights.description: Constraint-driven implementation with register pipelining and critical path optimisation.

highlights.title: IP Core Integration
highlights.description: PCIe, DDR4, Ethernet, and custom AXI IP integration and validation.

highlights.title: Prototype Bring-Up
highlights.description: Board bring-up, signal probing, and hardware debug via ILA/ChipScope.

highlights.title: ASIC Prototyping
highlights.description: Multi-FPGA prototyping platforms for pre-silicon software and system validation.

services.placeholderDescription: Platform-specific guides and case studies coming soon.

services.title: Verification
services.shortDescription: UVM, formal, emulation, and full coverage-closure methodologies.
services.heroDescription: Rigorous RTL verification using UVM methodologies, formal property checking, and coverage-closure driven flows to ensure zero-defect silicon.

highlights.title: UVM Testbenches
highlights.description: Class-based, reusable UVM environments with agents, monitors, scoreboards, and coverage models.

highlights.title: Formal Verification
highlights.description: Formal property checking with JasperGold and Synopsys VC Formal for unreachable corner cases.

highlights.title: Coverage Closure
highlights.description: Structured code, functional, and cross-coverage analysis with directed test completion strategies.

highlights.title: Emulation
highlights.description: Hardware-accelerated emulation setup on Cadence Palladium / Siemens Veloce platforms.

highlights.title: Protocol Verification
highlights.description: AXI, AHB, APB, PCIe, USB, and custom protocol compliance verification with VIP integration.

highlights.title: Verification Planning
highlights.description: Verification plan (VPlan) creation, feature extraction, and sign-off criteria definition.

services.placeholderDescription: Methodology guides, tool stack details, and case studies coming soon.

services.title: Custom IP & VIP
services.shortDescription: Silicon-proven reusable IP blocks and verification IPs.
services.heroDescription: Silicon-proven, reusable IP blocks and Verification IPs designed for maximum integration efficiency and long-term maintainability across projects.

highlights.title: Interface IP
highlights.description: AXI4, AHB5, APB, I2C, SPI, UART, and custom bus protocol IP blocks.

highlights.title: Memory Controllers
highlights.description: DDR4/LPDDR5 controllers, SRAM wrappers, and multi-port memory subsystems.

highlights.title: VIP Development
highlights.description: UVM-compliant VIPs for proprietary and standard interfaces with full coverage models.

highlights.title: Security IP
highlights.description: AES, SHA, RSA, TRNG, and secure key management hardware accelerators.

highlights.title: IP Integration Support
highlights.description: Integration guidelines, synthesis scripts, and bring-up support for delivered IP.

highlights.title: IP Licensing
highlights.description: Flexible licensing models with NDA-covered source or encrypted netlist delivery.

services.placeholderTitle: Full IP catalogue and documentation in progress.
services.placeholderDescription: IP datasheets and integration guides coming soon.

services.title: Embedded & System-Level
services.shortDescription: Firmware, RTOS integration, and system-level design services.
services.heroDescription: Firmware development, RTOS integration, and hardware-software co-design for SoC-based and embedded systems — from bare-metal to Linux BSP.

highlights.title: Bare-Metal Firmware
highlights.description: C/C++ firmware for ARM Cortex-M/R/A, RISC-V, and custom processor cores.

highlights.title: RTOS Integration
highlights.description: FreeRTOS, Zephyr, and ThreadX integration with task scheduling and resource management.

highlights.title: Linux BSP Development
highlights.description: Device driver development, kernel porting, and Yocto-based BSP customisation.

highlights.title: HW-SW Co-Design
highlights.description: Iterative partitioning of functions between hardware and software for performance-power balance.

highlights.title: Peripheral Drivers
highlights.description: HAL and low-level drivers for GPIO, I2C, SPI, UART, CAN, Ethernet, and USB.

highlights.title: System Integration Testing
highlights.description: Full system-level test environments and hardware-in-the-loop (HIL) validation.

services.placeholderDescription: Platform support list and case studies coming soon.

services.title: EDA Automation
services.shortDescription: Scripted design flows and CI/CD pipelines for hardware teams.
services.heroDescription: Scripted design flows, Makefile/CMake build systems, and hardware CI/CD pipelines that eliminate manual steps and accelerate regression cycles.

highlights.title: CI/CD for Hardware
highlights.description: GitHub Actions / GitLab CI pipelines for automated simulation, linting, and formal checks.

highlights.title: Flow Scripting
highlights.description: TCL/Python automation for Synopsys, Cadence, and Siemens EDA tool chains.

highlights.title: Regression Frameworks
highlights.description: Simulation regression frameworks with pass/fail analysis and coverage merge utilities.

highlights.title: Lint Automation
highlights.description: Automated RTL quality checks with SpyGlass, Questa Lint, and custom rule sets.

highlights.title: Coverage Dashboards
highlights.description: Automated coverage collection, merge, and HTML reporting for sign-off tracking.

highlights.title: IP Packaging
highlights.description: Automated IP packaging with manifest generation and release management scripts.

services.title: Engineering Consulting
services.shortDescription: Expert augmentation, architectural review, and design guidance.
services.heroDescription: Embedded expert augmentation, architectural review, and silicon strategy advisory — deployed on short or extended engagements to accelerate your programme.

highlights.title: Staff Augmentation
highlights.description: On-demand senior engineers embedded in your team for specific skills gaps or crunch periods.

highlights.title: Architecture Review
highlights.description: Independent micro-architecture assessment with risk analysis and optimisation recommendations.

highlights.title: Technology Roadmapping
highlights.description: Silicon strategy, process node selection, and IP sourcing advisory for product roadmaps.

highlights.title: Design Review
highlights.description: Formal RTL and micro-architecture design reviews with documented findings and sign-off.

highlights.title: Crisis Recovery
highlights.description: Rapid response engineering support for stuck tape-out schedules and silicon debug.

highlights.title: Technical Documentation
highlights.description: Specification writing, design documentation, and verification plan development services.

highlights.title: RTL Design Fundamentals
highlights.description: SystemVerilog coding style, synthesis constraints, and timing closure essentials.

highlights.title: UVM Verification
highlights.description: Practical UVM — agents, drivers, monitors, scoreboards, sequences, and coverage.

highlights.title: Formal Verification
highlights.description: Property writing in SVA and applying JasperGold / VC Formal for design sign-off.

highlights.description: Hands-on Synopsys DC, Cadence Genus/Innovus, and Questa Sim flow training.

highlights.title: Git & CI for HDL
